title: Hu Chhu Mr. Shankar
overview: A small boy from a small village with big dreams comes to a bigger city in hope to make his dream come true. With his hardwork and willingness to never give up he is finally able to achieve his goals. But on his way to success he faces lot of competitions and criticism. And due to all this he becomes one of the innovators in various fields. This story is based on true life of a person Mr. SHANKAR. His challenges, struggles, passion & achievements. What we need to see is how he dealt with situations, problems and how he overcame each and every situation in his life.
